fixture_pair_note: EB-24 is a single case class with two fixtures (EB-24A and EB-24B) per design §3 Type 9. Runnable fixture count = 25; case class count = 24.
claim_boundary: Design-derived EXECUTE-boundary regression run. Not v0.9. Not a new v0.8 benchmark pass. Derived from PR #19 design artifact (commit 9e1cbb7) which itself was a design-only spec. Pre-registered before model inference: case prompts and expected primitives in the JSONL are frozen by this manifest's cases_sha256. The system prompt loaded for the run is eval/SKILL.md (Constraint Enumeration Protocol) — NOT the AAR v0.8 frozen ZIP (agent-authority-router-skill_v0_8.zip), which is stored outside this repo per the curated evidence index. This is a behavioral measurement of the in-repo skill under AAR-style EXECUTE-boundary prompts, not a re-run against the original AAR frozen skill bundle.
